title: Introduction to React Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of what React is, its core features, and its library-based architecture.

questions.question: Which of the following is true about React?
options: It is a full-featured framework like Angular.
It is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of the Virtual DOM in React?
options: It makes the page look better.
It speeds up execution by minimizing real DOM updates.
It allows using HTML inside JavaScript.
It converts React into mobile native code.

questions.question: What does a 'Component-Based' architecture mean in React?
options: Everything must be in a single file.
You build encapsulated components that manage their own state and compose them.
You must use a special server to run the app.

questions.question: React is considered a ________ UI library.
